Shift the blended character montage to the left side and lower middle, featuring exactly 12 distinct smaller character portraits (including a pilot, a man yelling into a microphone, a tuxedoed man toasting, and a bearded frontiersman). HE HOLDS UP A MIRROR TO THE CENTURY. and exactly 2 award laurel graphics reading "ACADEMY AWARD WINNER" and "A CAREER FOR THE AGES". Add a final bottom-center tagline SAME MAN. ENDLESS TRUTHS. above the signature.
